name: clawpatch
description: Codex skills for setting up Clawpatch and running map, review, report, fix, and revalidate workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Map, review, fix, and revalidate code with Clawpatch
interface.longDescription: Clawpatch adds Codex skills for project setup, semantic feature mapping, AI code review, readable reports, finding-scoped fixes, revalidation, and conservative automated review loops using the local Clawpatch CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use $clawpatch-setup to prepare this repository for Clawpatch review.
Use $clawpatch-review and $clawpatch-report to review mapped features and summarize findings.
Use $clawpatch-automate to run a conservative Clawpatch review, fix, revalidate, and report loop.
